hero.description: Not a tour. Not a script. Just authentic stories, hidden trails, and the Albania you won't find in guidebooks.

whyMe.title: Why Me?
whyMe.subtitle: Because Albania deserves more than a checklist
whyMe.promise1: I don't follow crowds—I find the places locals actually love
whyMe.promise2: Every trip is tailored to you, not a template
whyMe.promise3: I speak the language, know the culture, and open doors you can't find online

coastal.title: Coastal Secrets
coastal.description: Hidden beaches, cliffside villages, and the Ionian Sea at sunset

mountain.title: Mountain Soul
mountain.description: Ancient trails, stone villages, and stories carved into the peaks

cultural.title: Cultural Immersion
cultural.description: Family meals, local traditions, and the heartbeat of Albanian life

custom.title: Your Own Path
custom.description: Tell me what moves you, and I'll craft something unforgettable

testimonials.title: Stories from the Road
testimonials.quote1: Arjes didn't just show us Albania—he made us feel it. Every moment was real.
testimonials.quote2: We went off-script and found magic. Best decision of our trip.
testimonials.quote3: Not a guide. A storyteller, a friend, a bridge to a place we'll never forget.

contact.title: Let's Create Your Story
contact.subtitle: Tell me where you want to go—or let me surprise you
